title: My MIL Stole Our $1.8M Win, Bought A Condo, Called It A Loan. So I Bought The One Next Door.
description: After my husband died, my mother-in-law cashed our winning lottery ticket alone, bought a beachfront condo, and claimed my $50 weekly payments were just grocery loans. I produced five years of bank statements, sued for a constructive trust, recovered $920,000, and purchased the condo next door to open a grief retreat for widows with a brass plaque: 'Generosity Rewarded, Greed Exposed.' #RevengeStory #FamilyBetrayal #LotteryJustice
thumb_text: SHE STOLE THE CONDO, I TOOK THE ONE NEXT DOOR

thumb_lines.text: I HAD BANK STATEMENTS PROVING OUR JOINT LOTTERY POOL
TURNED IT INTO A WIDOWS' GRIEF RETREAT
